scripts.generate:content-artifacts: npm run clean:generated && npm run generate:content-index && npm run generate:search-index && npm run generate:static-assets && npm run generate:static-metadata
scripts.build: npm run generate:content-artifacts && next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dist=path.resolve(process.cwd(), process.env.NEXT_DIST_DIR ?? '.next'); const out=path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'out'); fs.rmSync(out,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(dist,out,{recursive:true});"
scripts.test:content: npm run generate:content-artifacts && node --import tsx --test tests/content.test.ts
